title: nettork
description: Welcome to Nettork's Crystal Modpack, I made this modpack to optimize all of CPVP. This modpack got me to HT4 and soon LT3!
body:
## Nettork's Crystal Modpack
_Welcome to the page of NCM, this page is to make you download my awesome modpack that I spent a lot of time to make it perfect. I wanted to share this time I spent on this modpack so I released this modpack!_
### Why My modpack is better than others
> - It is better because my modpack got me to HT4 and almost LT3 .
> - It is better because I showed many HT3's this modpack and they said they would suggest it to people if i released it.
### What you will expect when you download this modpack
> - That the game is like vanilla but is super good for crystal pvp.
> - You'll expect that your game will be much cleaner in-game.
> - This modpack is not made for performance and don't expect higher fps.
### Compatibility and Requirements  
> - This modpack requires that you have a computer with good frames without any mods.
> - This modpack is **NOT** compatible with vulkan due to all the mods that require sodium.
### Community and Support
> - You can join the discord server and request support by opening a ticket in [The Network](https://discord.gg/qWFmWK865D)
> - The discord server is an on-growing community that just needs some members to chat and it will become super good.
### Installation Instructions
> - The installation process is super easy but for some people it may be hard so I made step to step intructions!
> 1. Click on Versions
> 2. Choose which Version you would like to install
> 3. Now click Download
> 4. After it finishs installing run the file (you must have the [modrinth app](https://modrinth.com/app)
> 5. In the modrinth app, find the name of the modpack in your library and play!
